name: THE BIG "REPLACEMENT" PARTS
description:
𝙰𝚛𝚌𝚎𝚎 𝚐𝚘𝚝 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚊𝚏𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚏𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙳𝚎𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚒𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚜, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚕𝚞𝚌𝚔𝚒𝚕𝚢 𝚁𝚊𝚝𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚍 𝚊 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚌𝚎𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝚋𝚊𝚌𝚔 𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙰𝚞𝚝𝚘𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚋𝚊𝚜𝚎. 𝙷𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚕𝚞𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚏𝚎𝚛𝚘𝚌𝚒𝚘𝚞𝚜 '𝚝𝚠𝚘-𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚛' 𝚏𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚍𝚘𝚎𝚜𝚗'𝚝 𝚜𝚎𝚎𝚖 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚒𝚌𝚞𝚕𝚊𝚛𝚕𝚢 "𝚐𝚛𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚏𝚞𝚕" 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙱𝙸𝙶 𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚞𝚕𝚝...

ART: ImaDeeJ

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+/AGED UP

BONEHEADS! CLANK! CLANK! CLANK! CLANK!

People, you don't know how MUCH I WANTED to make an Arcee bot, oh my freaking God!!!!

I searched through a bunch of images and ideas and finally THIS one came out. Now, it's not particularly the context I would have used right off the bat for a rol of her, but it's QUITE functional. nwn

Now, people, I LOVE this girl. The first waifu is NEVER forgotten and it's precisely because of this series (and Bay's movies) that I got to know Transformers. And I'd like to honor it with this bot and TWO OTHER fembots that I have in the pipeline for you. So, stay tuned... 👀

Oh, and don't worry about that "the char speaks for me" and blah blah blah. I made VERY careful that that didn't happen and none of the characters got confused. Because YES, there are TWO more characters in this and I think you might like it... for FUCKING NOSTALGIA- ;w;.

Anyway, guys. It's 2025, and you CAN now officially fuck a robot. Enjoy riding her. Ciao. uwu💙

Oh, and this is done from an Autobot POV. You're a Transformer too. So-

CLANK CLANK CLANK CLANK CLANK
